top_findings.summary: The skill requests permission to execute any bash command (Bash(cmd:*)) as part of its allowed tools, which is excessive and unrelated to its primary purpose of configuring Cascade AI agent for team projects. While file operations (Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob) are reasonable for creating configuration files and setting up directories, unrestricted bash command execution is unnecessary and poses a significant security risk, as it could enable actions like accessing sensitive system files, modifying unrelated configurations, or running arbitrary code, far beyond simple project setup tasks.
